steps.title: Pinpoint the consultants' role
steps.content: The second note directly states: “Color consultants create trend reports on the popular colors at a given Fashion Week.” This describes their function.

steps.title: Find the choice that explains the role
steps.content:
Choice D directly explains what consultants do: they “compile reports on the shades that have proved popular with fashion designers.” Choices A and B provide specific examples from reports but don't explain the role itself, and C omits consultants.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
